title: Packaging version ordering matches PEP 440 release phases
prompt: Fix compare_versions so it follows packaging-style PEP 440 ordering across dev, alpha, beta, rc, final, and post releases while still treating equivalent release forms like 1.0 and 1.0.0 as equal.
golden_patch_description: Match packaging/PEP 440 ordering across release phases without regressing core numeric comparison or equivalent-release equality.
instance_notes: Compact PEP 440 ordering slice derived from packaging version tests.
